activation.title: Activation
activation.reassign:
You can assign different
domain name to your device

activate.title: Activate
activate.premiumDescription: Syncloud manages your domain (like example.com). Subscription is required today.
activate.freeDescription: Syncloud manages [name].{domain} domain. Subscription is required in 30 days.

help.managedDomainText: Syncloud will manage DNS records for your personal domain name
help.freeAccountText: You need to register an account and have a valid Subscription no more than 30 days after the registration. It is only used to maintain dns records of your device. Data transfer happens directly between your apps and device.
help.premiumAccountText: You need to register an account and have a valid Subscription. It is only used to maintain dns records of your device. Data transfer happens directly between your apps and device.
help.deviceCredentialsText: Device credentials are used to access your device and all the apps (as admin user). They are stored on device and no one knows them. If you forget them you will need to reactivate your device.
